summary: Iteration 49: Verified Amazon Order SKU mapping flow. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: 1) 'Map SKUs First' badge shown for unmapped orders, 2) 'Add Tracking' button only enabled for mapped orders, 3) Tracking dialog has 'Save & Queue Only' and 'Save & Push to Amazon' buttons, 4) Push to Amazon 403 error shows helpful SP-API permission guidance, 5) Pending Fulfillment Queue shows Amazon orders with SKU info.
critical_code_review_comments: SKU Mapping Validation (server.py lines 20207-20224): Correctly checks all order items for SKU mappings before allowing tracking to be added. Returns 400 with clear error message listing unmapped SKUs.
Pending Fulfillment Enrichment (server.py lines 20309-20322): Correctly enriches items with master_sku_id, master_sku_name, and sku_code from amazon_sku_mappings collection.
Push to Amazon 403 Handling (server.py lines 20465-20477): Provides helpful error message explaining SP-API 'Direct-to-Consumer Shipping' role requirement.
Frontend SKU Check (AmazonOrders.jsx lines 580-620): Correctly shows 'Map SKUs First' badge for orders with unmapped items and 'Add Tracking' button only for fully mapped orders.
Tracking Dialog (AmazonOrders.jsx): Has both 'Save & Queue Only' and 'Save & Push to Amazon' buttons with proper handlers.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 passed, 2 skipped - no pending orders to test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Amazon order flow verified working: 1) Orders with unmapped SKUs show 'Map SKUs First' badge and cannot add tracking, 2) Orders with mapped SKUs show 'Add Tracking' button, 3) Order 402-7514039-9600367 has tracking added and is in Pending Fulfillment queue with 'Pending Dispatch' status, 4) Push to Amazon returns 403 with helpful SP-API permission error (expected - needs Seller Central configuration), 5) Pending Fulfillment Queue shows 5 entries including Amazon order with SKU info.

Backend API Tests.GET /api/amazon/orders/{firm_id}: PASS - Returns 35 orders with stats (15 MFN Pending, 19 Easy Ship, 1 Tracking Added)
Backend API Tests.POST /api/amazon/update-tracking: PASS - Endpoint exists and validates SKU mappings
Backend API Tests.POST /api/amazon/push-tracking: PASS - Returns 403 with helpful SP-API permission error
Backend API Tests.GET /api/amazon/unmapped-skus/{firm_id}: PASS - Returns list of unmapped SKUs
Backend API Tests.GET /api/pending-fulfillment: PASS - Returns 5 entries with SKU info
Backend API Tests.GET /api/pending-fulfillment?status=read: PASS - Returns entries with stock check
Backend API Tests.GET /api/master-skus: PASS - Returns master SKUs for mapping

Frontend UI Tests.Amazon Orders Page: PASS - Shows 35 orders for MuscleGrid Energy Solutions
Frontend UI Tests.SKU Mapping Warning Banner: PASS - Shows '12 Amazon SKU(s) need mapping' with Map SKUs button
Frontend UI Tests.Map SKUs First Badge: PASS - Shown for orders with unmapped SKUs (red badge)
Frontend UI Tests.Add Tracking Button: PASS - Only shown for orders with all SKUs mapped
Frontend UI Tests.Tracking Dialog: PASS - Shows carrier, tracking number, and MFN customer details fields
Frontend UI Tests.Pending Dispatch Badge: PASS - Shown for orders with tracking added
Frontend UI Tests.Push to Amazon Button: PASS - Present for orders with tracking
Frontend UI Tests.Push to Amazon 403 Error: PASS - Shows helpful message about SP-API permissions
Frontend UI Tests.Pending Fulfillment Queue: PASS - Shows 5 entries with Order/PI, Customer, SKU, Firm, Qty, Stock, Status columns

amazon_order_flow_summary.push_to_amazon_403_error: Expected - SP-API 'Direct-to-Consumer Shipping' role needed in Seller Central
